title: Custom Tool Definitions
learning_outcomes: Formulate function declaration schemas for tool call interfaces.

content_sections.title: Tool Declarations and Schema Formats
content_sections.content: To enable tool execution, agents must declare their interfaces to the model. This is structured as a list of tool declarations containing the function name, description, and parameter types formatted as JSON schemas. This schema allows the model to understand the tool's usage, inputs, and constraints.
